query: SELECT DAYNAME(slotDate) as dayName, DAYOFWEEK(slotDate) as dow, COUNT(*) as count, MIN(slotDate) as earliest, MAX(slotDate) as latest FROM schedule_slots WHERE programId IN (SELECT id FROM programs WHERE type = 'clinic_105') GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(slotDate), DAYNAME(slotDate) ORDER BY dow;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mUSTnZHSjH9Rc4V.ee5fccb85a53 --database kzZFsCRUb4iWMZR8LEwAKz --execute SELECT DAYNAME(slotDate) as dayName, DAYOFWEEK(slotDate) as dow, COUNT(*) as count, MIN(slotDate) as earliest, MAX(slotDate) as latest FROM schedule_slots WHERE programId IN (SELECT id FROM programs WHERE type = 'clinic_105') GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(slotDate), DAYNAME(slotDate) ORDER BY dow;
